Tan Fu (Wenyou) 檀敷 (文友)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tan Fu (檀敷), styledWenyou (文友), was born in Shanyang. One of the Eight Paragons of Jiangxia.
